[What is the main function of the blister packaging machine?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse1)

The primary function of a blister packaging machine is to convert roll stock into blisters suitable for containing pharmaceutical or other products through heated forming of the packaging material. The process also includes automated filling, sealing, and precise punching to ensure stable packaging quality in compliance with GMP standards.

[How is the blister packaging machine applied in pharmaceutical packaging?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse2)

Blister packaging machines are widely used in the pharmaceutical industry, particularly for solid dosage forms such as tablets, capsules, and soft gel capsules. They provide effective moisture and light protection, ensuring product efficacy and stability.

[What is the delivery lead time for the blister packaging machines?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse3)

For standard models, the typical delivery lead time is approximately 60 to 90 days after contract confirmation and receipt of the advance payment.

Three-Servo VS Full-Servo Blister Packaging Machine

Full-servo drive system
 Forming, indexing, heat sealing, punching, feeding, printing, robotic handling, and registration alignment are all servo-driven. All modules operate in coordinated linkage, enabling system-wide shutdown in case of faults while maintaining positional memory during power loss or stoppage. Individual modules can also operate independently for maintenance and adjustment.

Three-servo drive system
 Servo drive is applied to forming and indexing, active heat-sealing rollers, and punching feed. Other forming, punching, and printing stations are synchronized through mechanical transmission driven by the main motor, with speed controlled via frequency inverter. Mold changes require only parameter adjustment on the HMI, significantly reducing changeover time.

[What are the requirements for packaging films?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse23)

The sachet packaging machine is compatible with commonly used laminated films (such as PET/PE). Film rolls must be evenly wound without telescoping or eccentricity, as these may cause film feeding issues. Clear and consistent registration marks are essential for accurate pattern positioning. Recommended film thickness is within the designed range (e.g. 0.05–0.1 mm). For special materials, prior consultation is recommended.

[What packaging equipment is suitable for 4-side seal sachets for light-sensitive pharmaceutical powders?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse24)

The 4-side seal sachet packaging machines are suitable for strip-style light-shielding packaging and are recommended for powders requiring high light protection and sealing performance.

[What is the difference between full-servo and dual-servo packaging machines?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse25)

Full-servo packaging machines use servo motors at all stations, offering higher precision and speed, making them suitable for high-standard production environments. Dual-servo machines use servo drive for longitudinal sealing and support automatic double-sided registration tracking, making them more suitable for medium-output applications. Equipment selection can be optimized based on specific production requirements.

 Continuous Motion Horizontal Cartoner

Automatic cartoning machine for automatic leaflet folding, leaflet insertion, carton erecting, loading and closing

The continuous motion horizontal cartoner features a horizontal design with continuous motion drive, ensuring stable operation and a cartoning speed of up to 300 cartons/min. It is suitable for packaging blister packs, bottles, and similar products in the pharmaceutical, food, cosmetics, and daily chemical industries.

The cartoner can sequentially perform product feeding, infeed conveying, leaflet folding, leaflet insertion, carton erecting, carton feeding, and carton sealing. The entire process is fully enclosed. The main unit is fully servo-driven, offering wide application versatility.

Packaging Samples

Features

- Automatically completes leaflet folding, carton forming and opening, product insertion, batch code printing, and carton sealing; a hot-melt glue system can be added for hot-melt sealing.

- PLC-controlled system with photoelectric monitoring of each station. In case of abnormal operation, the machine stops automatically and displays the fault cause for quick troubleshooting.

- Equipped with intelligent inspection devices that prevent leaflet insertion and carton feeding when no product is present, allowing seamless integration with upstream equipment. Defective products (missing blister or leaflet) detected during inspection are automatically rejected at the discharge, ensuring consistent product quality.

- Can operate as a standalone unit or be linked with blister packaging machines and other equipment to form a complete production line.

- Packaging formats can be changed according to user requirements, with simple adjustment and commissioning. Suitable for large-volume single-product runs while also accommodating multiple specifications.

[How long does product changeover take, and is it complex?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse32)

Traditional machines often require replacement of multiple mechanical parts such as magazines, pushers, and guide rails, which is time-consuming. Only a few common parts need replacement, significantly reducing changeover time and simplifying operation.

title: Automatic Blister Packaging & Cartoning Line
content:
Automatic Blister Packaging & Cartoning Line

Automated packaging line integrating blister packaging machine and cartoning machine for pharmaceuticals

![Automatic Blister Packaging & Cartoning Line](https://blistermachine-en.com/products/blister-packaging-cartoning-line-6-1_img01_b.webp)

This automatic blister packaging & cartoning line integrates advanced technology, synchronized production, intelligent robots, and conveyor systems to automatically queue and deliver blister packs to the cartoner. The line seamlessly combines blister packaging and cartoning, featuring a rational layout, simple operation, improved production efficiency, and higher product yield. Labor intensity and production costs are reduced. The line can be connected with pillow packers, 3D packers, bundlers, shrink wrappers, and other auxiliary equipment.

The line is suitable for capsules, tablets, and shaped tablets with Alu-PVC or Alu-Alu packaging, enabling automatic blister forming, product filling, blister inspection and removal of defective units, blister queuing, carton pick-up, carton opening, tablet insertion, leaflet insertion, cartoning, and batch number printing. The fully servo-controlled line ensures GMP-compliant automated production.

Packaging Samples

Features

- The blister packaging & cartoning line enables intelligent communication and synchronized control between the blister machine and the cartoner. Blister packs are smoothly transferred via conveyor directly into the cartoner, eliminating intermediate handling, temporary storage, and manual intervention, which maximizes line efficiency. The design ensures balanced performance and broad applicability.

- Key positions on the line monitor missing units, broken tablets, fragments, blister sealing integrity, and leaflet insertion, ensuring 100% online inspection. Servo technology provides precise, gentle mechanical movements, producing well-formed, square cartons with smooth corners, free from scratches or deformation.

- The entire line is operated via PLC and a large touchscreen, allowing parameter setting, operational monitoring, data recording, and fault diagnosis at a glance. The intuitive interface simplifies operation and reduces labor dependency.

- All parts that come into contact with the product are made of stainless steel and have smooth surfaces, with no hard-to-reach areas, making cleaning and disinfection simple and effective. Safety features include door interlocks, emergency stop buttons, and multiple protective devices to ensure operator safety.

Technical Specifications

| Production rate | For 400-pocket blisters, 1 product per pocket yields 400 units per minute, while 2 products per pocket yield 200 units per minute. For 300-pocket blisters, 1 product per pocket yields 300 units per minute, while 2 products per pocket yield 150 units per minute. |
|---|---|
| Power supply | 380 V, 50 Hz |
| Air pressure | 0.6 MPa |
| Dimensions (L*W*H) | 11,500 × 1,800 × 1,800 mm (extendable based on conveyors and auxiliary equipment) |
| Line length | 11,500 mm (adjustable per configuration) |

Note: For Alu-Alu (Alu-PVC) blister packaging & cartoning line, configurations can be customized according to required capacity, product dimensions, and material specifications.

title: Automatic Sachet Packaging & Cartoning Line
content:
Automatic Sachet Packaging & Cartoning Line

Automated packaging line for efficient sachet filling and sealing of powders, granules, and liquids

![Automatic Sachet Packaging & Cartoning Line](https://blistermachine-en.com/products/sachet-packaging-cartoning-line-6-2_img01-b.webp)

The integrated production line combines the DXDK950 series sachet packaging machine with the ZH150 fully automatic cartoner. This line is suitable for the automatic dosing and filling of granules, powders, and similar materials into four-side-seal sachets, and automatically completes counting, arranging, carton loading, and carton sealing as downstream processes. The entire line adopts servo control and operates as a fully automatic, integrated production system. Optional functions such as online weighing can be configured according to customer requirements.

Features

- The production line is precisely engineered to ensure perfect synchronization between the sachet discharge speed of the packaging machine and the carton infeed speed of the cartoner. This eliminates material accumulation, waiting, and transfer between standalone machines, maximizing overall line efficiency.

- Key components of the line, including servo motors, PLC, pneumatic components, and optical sensors, are sourced from internationally recognized brands, ensuring durability, accuracy, and low failure rates during long-term high-load operation.

- From material filling to finished carton output, the entire process is completed within enclosed or semi-enclosed equipment, greatly reducing the risk of human and cross-contamination. The line offers a high hygiene level and fully complies with GMP requirements for the food and pharmaceutical industries.

- A large touchscreen displays production data, operating status, fault locations, and troubleshooting guidance in real time. The intuitive interface simplifies operation, while built-in self-diagnosis and alarm history functions enable rapid fault identification and reduced downtime.

Packaging Samples

Technical Specifications

| Production rate | ≤150 cartons/min |
|---|---|
| Power supply | 380 V, 50 Hz |
| Air pressure | 0.5–0.7 MPa |
| Dimensions (L*W*H) | (65–125) × (45–90) × (12–55) mm |

Note: Line functions can be further expanded according to customer requirements.

[What are the advantages of integrated production lines?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse37)

Integrated packaging lines combine sachet packaging, automatic cartoning, online inspection, and finished product conveying into a single system, enabling seamless connection between each packaging stage. This significantly improves production efficiency and automation levels, allows faster response to market demand, reduces downtime, minimizes manual intervention, and ensures stable and consistent production.

[How is stability and safety ensured in high-speed blister packaging?](https://blistermachine-en.com/#collapse38)

Our high-speed blister packaging equipment uses high-precision temperature control systems and automatic correction technology, combined with AI-based visual inspection to ensure blister sealing quality and safety. This effectively prevents material leakage and cross-contamination, ensuring stable operation during high-speed production.

title: GMP-Compliant Packaging Machinery Since 1998
content:
![Company Profile](https://blistermachine-en.com/about/company-profile_img01b.webp)

GMP-Compliant Packaging Machinery Since 1998

Founded in 1998, Huaxin Package is an enterprise specializing in high-end pharmaceutical packaging equipment. Our comprehensive portfolio includes blister packaging machines, 4-side sealing sachet packaging machines, and automatic cartoners. Dedicated to the pharmaceutical, food, and chemical sectors, we provide clients with efficient, intelligent, and reliable integrated packaging lines. Huaxin Package is committed to the seamless integration of research, design, and manufacturing to deliver optimized and intelligent packaging solutions.

The company founder graduated from Shanghai Jiao Tong University and is among the first senior technical engineers in New China. In 1981, he designed and developed China’s first aluminum-plastic blister packaging machine and launched the nation’s first high-speed blister packaging machine in 1997. Huaxin Package has long been a member of the China Pharmaceutical Equipment Association, the first to achieve ISO9001 international quality certification, and has obtained multiple national patents. Subsequently, the company introduced 4-side sealing sachet packaging machines, high-speed cartoners, and independently developed high-speed Alu-PVC and Alu-Alu blister cartoning machines.

The factory covers an area of 8,000㎡ with a building area of 4,800㎡, featuring standardized production workshops, an R&D center, and storage facilities. The facility layout is rational and fully equipped to support both R&D and mass production of various packaging machinery. Currently, the factory employs over 100 staff, with an R&D center composed of senior engineers and technical specialists. Significant annual investment is allocated to technological innovation and product iteration across multiple fields including mechanical design, electrical control, and automation programming, demonstrating strong technical capability and innovative strength.
